ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot forming a zero with its arms.  The robot will use both arms to create a circle shape. The animation will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the precision of the robot. Frame 1 starts with both arms outstretched to the sides, preparing to form the zero. Frame 2 shows the arms moving slightly inward, beginning the circular shape. Frame 3 completes the circle, with the arms meeting in front of the robot. Frame 4 briefly pauses with the circle complete, and in Frame 5, the arms slowly return to their starting position.

frames.beat: arms sweep out wide, ready to form a zero
arms begin to curve inward, shaping the circle
arms meet in front, completing the zero shape
holding the zero steady, a moment of perfect form
arms slowly return to resting position
